ddls:
CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "household_type_name" TEXT /* Name describing the type of household */,
  "household_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the household type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the household type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the household type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of household */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is recorded */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of households for the given year */,
  "percentage_of_total" TEXT /* Percentage of total households for the given year */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income of households for the given year */,
  "average_family_size" TEXT /* Average family size of households for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., pdf, csv, excel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_permissions" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "role_id")
)
